one_time_description: Settlement funds from Government of Canada
economic_notes: Skw'lax Investments Inc., 0990532 B.C. Ltd., and Skw'lax Timber Limited Partnership are government business enterprises accounted for on modified equity basis. Natural Resource Management segment generated $4,888,074 surplus. Social Housing consolidated as subsidiary.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED - GBEs use ASPE instead of IFRS as required by PSAS. Fiscal year is 2022 not 2024. Three GBEs on modified equity basis: Skw'lax Investments Inc., 0990532 B.C. Ltd., and Skw'lax Timber Limited Partnership. Social Housing is fully consolidated subsidiary. Settlement funds of $1,740,529 from Government of Canada appear to be a one-time item (no 2021 comparative). total_government_transfers calculated as ISC $4,263,847 + Fisheries $54,900 + Province of BC $4,862,728 + Natural Resources Canada $387,147 + Settlement funds $1,740,529 + CMHC $153,300 = $11,462,451; osr = $20,177,535 - $11,462,451 = $8,715,084. Amortization in expenses by object is $1,113,575 but Exhibit B shows $945,381 — difference likely includes GBE amortization. Annual debt service is principal repayment only per cash flow statement $209,247. No remuneration schedule present in the document.
